metadata.description: Linux administrator username for SSH access.
SSH public key used to sign in to the VM.
VM size for the personal deployment.
Managed data disk size in GiB for /data.
Optional custom hostname. If empty, Azure-generated public DNS is used.
Optional Azure OpenAI resource endpoint, for example https://myresource.openai.azure.com.
Optional Azure OpenAI deployment name used by OpenClaw as the primary model ref.
API key for the Azure OpenAI resource. Required when azureOpenAiAuthMode is 'key'. Leave empty when using 'managedIdentity'.
Authentication mode for Azure OpenAI. 'key' uses an API key; 'managedIdentity' uses the VM system-assigned managed identity with Entra ID.

Required when azureOpenAiAuthMode is 'managedIdentity'. Full resource ID of the Cognitive Services account, e.g. /subscriptions/{sub}/resourceGroups/{rg}/providers/Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts/{name}.
Optional Feishu App ID for WebSocket bot integration.
Optional Feishu App Secret for WebSocket bot integration.
Optional Microsoft Teams Bot App ID. Fill in both Teams fields together, or leave both empty. Azure Global only.
Optional Microsoft Teams Bot App Password. Fill in both Teams fields together, or leave both empty. Azure Global only.

variables.msteamsWebhookUrl: [if(empty(parameters('hostname')), format('https://{0}{1}', variables('publicFqdn'), variables('msteamsWebhookPath')), format('https://{0}{1}', parameters('hostname'), variables('msteamsWebhookPath')))]
variables.azureOpenAiKeyValidation: [if(not(variables('useKeyAuth')), 'disabled', if(and(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiEndpoint')), empty(parameters('azureOpenAiDeployment')), empty(parameters('azureOpenAiApiKey'))), 'disabled', if(and(not(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiEndpoint'))), not(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiDeployment'))), not(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiApiKey')))), 'enabled', string(int('When azureOpenAiAuthMode is key, azureOpenAiEndpoint, azureOpenAiDeployment, and azureOpenAiApiKey must all be provided or all be empty.')))))]
variables.azureOpenAiMiValidation: [if(not(variables('useManagedIdentityAuth')), 'disabled', if(and(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiEndpoint')), empty(parameters('azureOpenAiDeployment')), empty(parameters('azureOpenAiResourceId'))), 'disabled', if(and(not(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiEndpoint'))), not(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiDeployment'))), not(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiResourceId')))), 'enabled', string(int('When azureOpenAiAuthMode is managedIdentity, azureOpenAiEndpoint, azureOpenAiDeployment, and azureOpenAiResourceId must all be provided or all be empty.')))))]
variables.feishuValidationMode: [if(and(empty(parameters('feishuAppId')), empty(parameters('feishuAppSecret'))), 'disabled', if(and(not(empty(parameters('feishuAppId'))), not(empty(parameters('feishuAppSecret')))), 'enabled', string(int('feishu parameters feishuAppId and feishuAppSecret must either both be provided or both be empty.'))))]
variables.msteamsValidationMode: [if(and(empty(parameters('msteamsAppId')), empty(parameters('msteamsAppPassword'))), 'disabled', if(and(not(empty(parameters('msteamsAppId'))), not(empty(parameters('msteamsAppPassword'))), not(variables('isAzureChinaCloud'))), 'enabled', string(int('Microsoft Teams standard mode requires both msteamsAppId and msteamsAppPassword, and is supported only in Azure Global.'))))]
variables.tokenRefreshScriptContent:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
TOKEN=$(curl -s 'http://169.254.169.254/metadata/identity/oauth2/token?api-version=2018-02-01&resource=https%3A%2F%2Fcognitiveservices.azure.com%2F' -H 'Metadata: true' | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['access_token'])")
if [ -n "$TOKEN" ]; then
  sed -i "s|^OPENAI_API_KEY=.*|OPENAI_API_KEY=$TOKEN|" /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env
  systemctl restart openclaw-gateway
  echo "$(date): Token refreshed" >> /var/log/openclaw-token-refresh.log
else
  echo "$(date): Token refresh FAILED" >> /var/log/openclaw-token-refresh.log
  exit 1
fi
variables.tokenRefreshServiceContent:
[concat('[Unit]
Description=Refresh Azure Entra ID token for OpenClaw

[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/openclaw-refresh-token.sh
')]
variables.tokenRefreshTimerContent:
[concat('[Unit]
Description=Refresh Azure Entra ID token every 45 minutes

[Timer]
OnBootSec=1min
OnUnitActiveSec=45min
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
')]
variables.managedIdentityBootstrapBlock:
[if(and(variables('useManagedIdentityAuth'), variables('hasAzureOpenAiConfig')), concat('printf ', '''', '%s', '''', ' ', '''', base64(variables('tokenRefreshScriptContent')), '''', ' | base64 -d > /usr/local/bin/openclaw-refresh-token.sh
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/openclaw-refresh-token.sh
printf ', '''', '%s', '''', ' ', '''', base64(variables('tokenRefreshServiceContent')), '''', ' | base64 -d > /etc/systemd/system/openclaw-token-refresh.service
printf ', '''', '%s', '''', ' ', '''', base64(variables('tokenRefreshTimerContent')), '''', ' | base64 -d > /etc/systemd/system/openclaw-token-refresh.timer
systemctl daemon-reload
systemctl enable --now openclaw-token-refresh.timer
INITIAL_TOKEN=$(curl -s ', '''', 'http://169.254.169.254/metadata/identity/oauth2/token?api-version=2018-02-01&resource=https%3A%2F%2Fcognitiveservices.azure.com%2F', '''', ' -H ', '''', 'Metadata: true', '''', ' | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)[', '''', 'access_token', '''', '])" || true)
if [ -n "$INITIAL_TOKEN" ]; then
  sed -i "s|^OPENAI_API_KEY=.*|OPENAI_API_KEY=$INITIAL_TOKEN|" /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env
fi
'), '')]
variables.bootstrapScript:
[format('#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euxo pipefail
export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
cloud-init status --wait || true
while fuser /var/lib/dpkg/lock >/dev/null 2>&1 || fuser /var/lib/dpkg/lock-frontend >/dev/null 2>&1 || fuser /var/lib/apt/lists/lock >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 5; done
apt-get update
apt-get install -y ca-certificates curl git caddy
install -d -o root -g {5} -m 0750 /etc/openclaw
TOKEN=$(head -c 24 /dev/urandom | base64 | tr -d ''\n'' | tr ''/+'' ''_-'' )
cat > /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env <<EOF
HOME=/home/{5}
OPENCLAW_HOME=/home/{5}
OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/data
OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=/data/openclaw.json
OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PORT={0}
OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN=$TOKEN
OPENCLAW_PUBLIC_URL={4}
OPENAI_API_KEY={1}
FEISHU_APP_ID={6}
FEISHU_APP_SECRET={7}
MSTEAMS_APP_ID={8}
MSTEAMS_APP_PASSWORD={9}
MSTEAMS_TENANT_ID={10}
EOF
chown root:{5} /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env
chmod 640 /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env
cat > /etc/profile.d/openclaw.sh <<''EOF''
if [ "$(id -un)" = "{5}" ] && [ -r /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env ]; then
  set -a
  . /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env
  set +a
fi
EOF
chmod 644 /etc/profile.d/openclaw.sh
cat > /home/{5}/.openclaw-env.sh <<''EOF''
if [ -r /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env ]; then
  set -a
  . /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env
  set +a
fi
EOF
chown {5}:{5} /home/{5}/.openclaw-env.sh
chmod 600 /home/{5}/.openclaw-env.sh
grep -qxF "[ -f ~/.openclaw-env.sh ] && . ~/.openclaw-env.sh" /home/{5}/.profile || echo "[ -f ~/.openclaw-env.sh ] && . ~/.openclaw-env.sh" >> /home/{5}/.profile
grep -qxF "[ -f ~/.openclaw-env.sh ] && . ~/.openclaw-env.sh" /home/{5}/.bashrc || echo "[ -f ~/.openclaw-env.sh ] && . ~/.openclaw-env.sh" >> /home/{5}/.bashrc
cat > /usr/local/bin/openclaw-browser-url <<''EOF''
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
sudo sh -lc ''. /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env && printf "Dashboard URL: %s#token=%s\n" "$OPENCLAW_PUBLIC_URL" "$OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN"''
EOF
chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/openclaw-browser-url
cat > /usr/local/bin/openclaw-approve-browser <<''EOF''
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
sudo sh -lc ''. /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env && exec sudo -u {5} env HOME=/home/{5} OPENCLAW_HOME=/home/{5} OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/data OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=/data/openclaw.json OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN="$OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN" OPENAI_API_KEY="$OPENAI_API_KEY" FEISHU_APP_ID="$FEISHU_APP_ID" FEISHU_APP_SECRET="$FEISHU_APP_SECRET" MSTEAMS_APP_ID="$MSTEAMS_APP_ID" MSTEAMS_APP_PASSWORD="$MSTEAMS_APP_PASSWORD" MSTEAMS_TENANT_ID="$MSTEAMS_TENANT_ID" /usr/local/bin/openclaw devices approve --latest''
EOF
chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/openclaw-approve-browser
DATA_DEVICE=/dev/disk/azure/scsi1/lun0
mkdir -p /data /data/workspace
if [ -b "$DATA_DEVICE" ]; then
  if ! blkid "$DATA_DEVICE" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    mkfs.ext4 -F "$DATA_DEVICE"
  fi
  uuid=$(blkid -s UUID -o value "$DATA_DEVICE")
  if ! grep -q "$uuid" /etc/fstab; then
    echo "UUID=$uuid /data ext4 defaults,nofail 0 2" >> /etc/fstab
  fi
  mount -a
fi
install -d -o {5} -g {5} /home/{5} /data /data/workspace
if [ -L /home/{5}/.openclaw ]; then
  :
elif [ ! -e /home/{5}/.openclaw ]; then
  ln -s /data /home/{5}/.openclaw
elif [ -d /home/{5}/.openclaw ] && [ -z "$(ls -A /home/{5}/.openclaw 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
  rmdir /home/{5}/.openclaw
  ln -s /data /home/{5}/.openclaw
fi
export HOME=/root
git config --global --add url."https://github.com/".insteadOf ssh://git@github.com/
git config --global --add url."https://github.com/".insteadOf git@github.com:
curl -fsSL --proto ''=https'' --tlsv1.2 https://openclaw.ai/install-cli.sh | bash -s -- --prefix /opt/openclaw --version latest
OPENCLAW_NODE_BIN=""
for candidate in /opt/openclaw/tools/node-v*/bin; do
  if [ -x "$candidate/node" ] && [ -x "$candidate/npm" ]; then
    OPENCLAW_NODE_BIN="$candidate"
    break
  fi
done
if [ -z "$OPENCLAW_NODE_BIN" ]; then
  echo "Embedded OpenClaw Node runtime not found under /opt/openclaw/tools" >&2
  exit 1
fi
ln -sf "$OPENCLAW_NODE_BIN/node" /usr/local/bin/node
ln -sf "$OPENCLAW_NODE_BIN/npm" /usr/local/bin/npm
if [ -x "$OPENCLAW_NODE_BIN/npx" ]; then
  ln -sf "$OPENCLAW_NODE_BIN/npx" /usr/local/bin/npx
fi
ln -sf /opt/openclaw/bin/openclaw /usr/local/bin/openclaw
if [ -n "{8}" ]; then
  sudo -u {5} env HOME=/home/{5} OPENCLAW_HOME=/home/{5} /usr/local/bin/openclaw plugins install @openclaw/msteams
fi
printf ''%s'' ''{2}'' | base64 -d > /data/openclaw.json
printf ''%s'' ''{3}'' | base64 -d > /etc/caddy/Caddyfile
chown {5}:{5} /data/openclaw.json
chown -R {5}:{5} /data /home/{5}
{11}
MCP_API_KEY=$(head -c 32 /dev/urandom | xxd -p -c 64)
printf ''MCP_API_KEY=%s\n'' "$MCP_API_KEY" >> /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env
mkdir -p /opt/openclaw-mcp
printf ''%s'' ''{12}'' | base64 -d > /opt/openclaw-mcp/package.json
printf ''%s'' ''{13}'' | base64 -d > /opt/openclaw-mcp/server.mjs
chown -R {5}:{5} /opt/openclaw-mcp
export PATH=/opt/openclaw/tools/node-v*/bin:$PATH
cd /opt/openclaw-mcp && npm install --production
cat > /etc/systemd/system/openclaw-mcp.service <<''EOF''
[Unit]
Description=OpenClaw MCP Bridge
After=network-online.target openclaw-gateway.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User={5}
Group={5}
EnvironmentFile=/etc/openclaw/openclaw.env
Environment=PORT=3000
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/node /opt/openclaw-mcp/server.mjs
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
WorkingDirectory=/data

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF
cat > /etc/systemd/system/openclaw-gateway.service <<''EOF''
[Unit]
Description=OpenClaw Gateway
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User={5}
Group={5}
EnvironmentFile=/etc/openclaw/openclaw.env
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/openclaw gateway --bind loopback --port {0}
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
WorkingDirectory=/data

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF
systemctl daemon-reload
systemctl enable openclaw-gateway openclaw-mcp caddy
systemctl restart openclaw-gateway
systemctl restart openclaw-mcp
systemctl restart caddy
', string(variables('openclawPort')), parameters('azureOpenAiApiKey'), variables('openclawConfigBase64'), variables('caddyConfigBase64'), variables('publicControlUrl'), parameters('adminUsername'), parameters('feishuAppId'), parameters('feishuAppSecret'), parameters('msteamsAppId'), parameters('msteamsAppPassword'), variables('msteamsTenantId'), variables('managedIdentityBootstrapBlock'), variables('mcpBridgePackageJsonBase64'), variables('mcpBridgeServerBase64'))]

mcpApiKeyNote.value: SSH into the VM and run: sudo grep MCP_API_KEY /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env
